title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 29 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 29 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 29 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/07/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures dropped slightly, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 786, down 1.75% for the day.Traders' willingness to sell was weak. Steel mills adopted a cautious wait-and-see aƫtude, with some purchasing as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
